message:
security: Gemini lane 2 — lease fencing rebase hardening + verified MeshIdentity tags

Applies two Gemini lane-2 mesh hardening findings documented in the
Part 2 section of GEMINI_LANE2_MESH.md:

- crates/fcp-mesh/src/coordinator.rs: Lease fencing token rebase
  vulnerability. The rebase_next_seq path previously allowed an
  incoming fencing token with the same seq as the local view to
  replace the existing lease holder. A racing peer could exploit the
  equality edge to rebase onto someone else's token and claim their
  lease. The rebase now requires strict monotonicity and validates
  the fencing-token precondition before any mutation.

- crates/fcp-tailscale/src/identity.rs: Unverified MeshIdentity tags.
  fcp_tags() previously returned the raw FCP tag set from
  MeshIdentity even when the underlying attestation was missing or
  expired, so callers downstream of an identity-but-not-attestation
  gate would key off untrusted tags. Now returns an empty tag set
  when the attestation is not valid. Adds verified_fcp_tags() for
  callers that need a strict error result on unverified identities
  rather than silently-empty tags, so the mesh transport layer can
  refuse to dispatch when verification fails instead of silently
  degrading to an unidentified peer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
